name: Fix prod /api/assets 500 and asset detail load errors

description: Attempted baseline browser smoke test for asset detail/prod API issue; test runner exited because dev scripts terminated early during bun test startup

asi.hypothesis: The reported asset detail/prod /api/assets failure can be reproduced by the existing browser smoke test and/or server smoke tests before any code changes.
asi.rollback_reason: No code changes were made; the experiment failed during environment startup rather than revealing the application bug.
asi.next_action_hint: Run the specific browser smoke test with a stable dev server process, then add a red test that asserts the asset detail route does not crash and /api/assets returns 200 for the failing path.
